nodes.label: AI as assistant for pattern recognition and data analysis
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of irrelevant or misleading patterns
nodes.grounding_span: AI is quite helpful for me as it helps recognise some patterns or things I might have missed

nodes.label: AI as proofreader and information retriever
nodes.label_negative: AI as inefficient for quick tasks
nodes.grounding_span: the main role of AI in my typical work day is that of an assistant, proofreader

nodes.label: AI reliance on curated data to avoid distraction
nodes.grounding_span: if i give too much information that is not needed it can sway the attention of the AI on less important aspects

nodes.label: AI handling of ambiguous or misattributed feedback
nodes.label_negative: AI misinterpreting feedback due to lack of context
nodes.grounding_span: some feedbacks can be really generic and they might not have anything to do with the event itself

nodes.label: AI use with sensitive data
nodes.label_negative: AI use avoided due to data sensitivity
nodes.grounding_span: the main thing that stops me from using Ai is if i am using sensitive information

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool for complex tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as time-wasting for simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it is just a matter of time mainly if i think i can permorm the task easily myself i will just do it

nodes.label: AI stigma in workplace culture
nodes.label_negative: Open acceptance of AI as legitimate aid
nodes.grounding_span: there is a stigma around it still

nodes.label: AI as collaborative tool requiring human oversight
nodes.grounding_span: i have the capability to work alongside of AI

nodes.label: AI communication clarity for task specification
nodes.label_negative: AI misunderstanding due to poor communication
nodes.grounding_span: i couldn't understand how to explain my need correctly and kept creating misunderstandings

nodes.label: Efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: the AI has helped especially during busy times where the workflow is higher and the time is still the same to complete more tasks

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: i will filter them out to avoid any mistakes

nodes.label: Data privacy and security
nodes.grounding_span: if i am using sensitive information

nodes.label: Professional reputation and perceived competence
nodes.grounding_span: i don't want it to come across as if the Ai is doing everything

nodes.label: Understanding and control
nodes.grounding_span: i do strongly believe that it is important to have people alongised that are capable to understand and use it correctly

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI as pattern recognizer
nodes.grounding_span: AI is quite helpful for me as it helps recognise some patterns

nodes.label: Frustration with AI miscommunication

nodes.label: Discretion about AI use due to stigma
nodes.grounding_span: i do find myself sometimes being discreet about it

nodes.label: Confidence in human-AI collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: i have the capability to work alongside of AI

nodes.label: Proactive data curation and filtering
nodes.grounding_span: i will look at the feedback and include only the pertinent ones
